segments.text: Hear me, my God, as I voice my complaint; protect my life from the threat of the enemy.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Hide me from the conspiracy of the wicked, from the plots of evildoers.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They sharpen their tongues like swords and aim cruel words like deadly arrows.
They shoot from ambush at the innocent; they shoot suddenly, without fear.
They encourage each other in evil plans, they talk about hiding their snares;
We have devised a perfect plan!
segments.speaker: Wicked People

segments.text: Surely the human mind and heart are cunning.
But God will shoot them with his arrows; they will suddenly be struck down.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He will turn their own tongues against them and bring them to ruin; all who see them will shake their heads in scorn.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All people will fear; they will proclaim the works of God and ponder what he has done.
The righteous will rejoice in the Lord and take refuge in him; all the upright in heart will glory in him!
